subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath appeared and spoken forth in this age, the Day which hath been ennobled by His advent - the divine Ridván. Sovereignty belongeth unto God, the Almighty, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی ظهر و نطق فی عصر یوم تشرف بقدومه الرضوان الملک لله المقتدر العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
